citation.site: LATTE (Lulin-ASIAA Telescope for Transients and Education) annual raw-data release

accreditation.organization: ASIAA / Lulin Observatory (MOU w/ Institute of Astronomy, National Central University)

readme_extractions_2026_07_09.ROW_ORDER_TRAP: MaxIM DL files (folders YYYYMMDD) are MIRRORED-at-save (correct in DS9); N.I.N.A. files (folders YYYY-MM-DD) are NOT — vertically mirrored vs MaxIM. Mixing calibration frames across the two systems requires mirroring one. FOLDER NAME FORMAT = the parity discriminator (feeds our image-space parity trap).
readme_extractions_2026_07_09.filters: Johnson-Cousins B,V,R,I + Ha + [OIII] + L (swaps documented in observing logs) — PHOTOMETRIC-STANDARD filters: measured B-V vs catalog B-V becomes directly testable (color fidelity gate on real photometric system).
readme_extractions_2026_07_09.calibration_rules: Bias/darks in Calibration_Frames dir. 16803-era flats NIGHTLY (use closest-in-time); CMOS-era flats per equipment epoch (pick within same period per logs). 16803 short flats = long/short PAIRS, subtract short from long to kill shutter shadow.
readme_extractions_2026_07_09.on_disk: D:/AstroLogic/intake/latte — readme.pdf + 30x M33-Pos13 Johnson-B Bin2 300s raw subs (16803, 20230216, MaxIM-era) + 7x Moravian Panel Ha/L frames (20230305); Moravian zip still downloading

use_case.evidence: Terms explicitly allow scientific studies + astrophotographic processing, free download without permission; instrument testing = scientific use.

blockers: MUST acknowledge LATTE as data source on any public display of results
NO selling products derived from LATTE data (LATTE-derived dossiers must never enter any paid tier)
NO use in religious/political/commercial activities even non-profit
citation.etiquette_HARD: Dropbox TRIAL account, 100k daily download cap shared by ALL users: read README first, use observing logs to select, download ONLY immediately-needed files, NEVER bulk-mirror or folder-zip; provide Dropbox-experience feedback to the project.
citation.terms: 2022 release = Apogee F16M / Kodak 16803 CCD (4kx4k, 9um, 36x36mm), PlaneWave CDK20 50cm F/6.8 @ Lulin (el 2862m). Shutter-shadow trap: short flats taken in long/short PAIRS — subtract short from long to remove the shadow. Post-Mar-2023 camera = Moravian C5A-100M (IMX461, 3.76um, default 2x2 bin) — future releases.
citation.owner_authorization: owner supplied link + terms screenshot 2026-07-09 late; 'readme is a goldmine — data and mono fits'

sources.label: latte_PENDING_SELECTION
sources.url: PENDING — Dropbox folder is a JS shell (no keyless enumeration); obtain README + observing-log FILE links first (owner browser / Chrome-extension session), then add selective per-file dl=1 http entries here per LATTE etiquette.
